discussion_comments.commented_code: @@ -1,4 +1,14 @@
discussion_comments.comment_body: **question(blocking)**: What does CTRL + Enter do? I've tried it, it doesn't seem to do anything. --- **suggestion(non-blocking)**: Use [``](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/kbd) to describe keyboard keys: ```suggestion {{ ctrlSymbol }} + Enter| ``` Visually, the only difference is that `` elements are monospaced: ### Before ![image](https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid/assets/19716675/9fd33e77-38ad-4c7e-87c4-a133cbfcc976) ### After ![image](https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid/assets/19716675/a82791c1-d6fe-408d-9591-070bae5c0edb)

discussion_comments.commented_code: @@ -1,4 +1,14 @@
discussion_comments.comment_body: > question(blocking): What does CTRL + Enter do? I've tried it, it doesn't seem to do anything. I thought meta would handle both command and control. Will add a separate handler for control then. It's supposed to render the diagram. --- > suggestion(non-blocking): Use [](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/kbd) to describe keyboard keys: I had `` initially, but it was making the meta character smaller. Instead of adding extra CSS, decided to remove kbd as the one without it looked good enough. --- > IMO, we could even completely remove the ```mermaid-nocode blocks if you want. I think @nirname added them explicitly to remove the code, let's not change that behaviour. Let me see how hard it'll be to not break it.
